results.title: Columbus Parks & Rec Deletes Post Claiming City Hall Would Raise Somalia Flag Before America 250
results.description: Current and former Republican officials criticized the Columbus, Ohio, Parks and Recreation Department on Wednesday after its X account posted, then deleted, a Somali Independence Day message that a city spokesperson confirmed to Breitbart News inaccurately that City Hall would raise Somalia’s flag. The Columbus Parks & Rec X account, @ColsRecParks, which has a profile [...] The post Columbus Parks & Rec Deletes Post Claiming City Hall Would Raise Somalia Flag Before America 250 appeared first on CBNC .
